title: Filter Shower Head and Hose with 1.6M Hose - YEAUPE PRO Power Shower Hose and Head Low Pressure Water Softener Shower Head, Large Universal Electric Shower Head for Hard Water,White
features: Newest Filtered Shower Head:The shower head with handheld has red, gray, and black mineral beads to purify the water and eliminate residual chlorine, remove harmful substances such as heavy metals , regulate the water's pH to maintain a weakly alkaline balance, and help restore healthy, smooth skin and strong, soft hair. This hard water shower head filter provides a healthy shower experience, especially for the elderly, women, and children

High Pressure and Water Saving Shower Head: This handheld filter shower head with hose mixes water and air to achieve high pressure and increase water flow, providing a strong shower spray even with low water pressure. The new nozzle design makes the water outlet more dense, saving up to 50% of water without sacrificing performance.It is an excellent low water pressure shower head

6 Spray Modes Water Softener Shower Head: This handheld shower head filer has 6 spray settings to choose with one click button. The high-pressure filtering showerhead for hard water can help relieve muscle tension and restore body energy. Choose according to your preference for a personalized shower experience

Good Quality Shower Head:This handheld showerhead is made of high-quality ABS chrome plating, making it durable and fade-resistant. The 61-inch stainless steel hose is rust and corrosion-resistant. The adjustable bracket makes it more convenient to use. The showerhead features a self-cleaning silicone nozzle, which can be easily cleaned with a soft cloth, ensuring a healthier shower and a cleaner showerhead
WarmTips:The shower head without shower hose,but fits most G1/2 shower hose.No tools required.The shower head is your new healthy manager.Any problems please contact us in time
